name: Orange Venison Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, sauté mushrooms and shallots in 4 tablespoons of butter until the mushrooms are browned.
2. Add white wine to the skillet; cook over high heat until reduced by half.
3. Pour the mixture into a 3-quart casserole dish.
4. Dredge the venison lightly in flour, then sauté in the remaining 2 tablespoons of butter.
5. Add tomatoes, peppers, potatoes, and onions to the skillet; sauté for about 5 minutes, stirring frequently.
6. Stir in orange peel and all-purpose flour.
7. Add beef broth; stir until thickened.
8. Boil for an additional minute.
9. Pour the mixture back into the casserole dish, add bay leaf, cover, and bake at 350°F for 1 1/4 hours or until meat and vegetables are tender. Remove bay leaf before serving.
